summary: Completed frontend testing of mobile navigation redesign and P0 auth fix. All 10 test scenarios passed. Desktop nav unchanged, mobile nav (48px top bar + 64px bottom nav) working correctly with proper colors and navigation.

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing DialogTitle for accessibility (console warning). Has sr-only span as workaround but Radix warns.

passed_tests: Desktop nav visible at 1920px with all 9 elements (logo, Hive, Explore, Collection, Honeypot, Search, DM badge, bell, avatar)
Desktop nav has hidden md:block class - hidden on mobile, visible on desktop
Mobile top bar has md:hidden class - visible on mobile, hidden on desktop
Mobile bottom nav has md:hidden class - visible on mobile, hidden on desktop
Mobile slim top bar is 48px height (h-12) with cream bg #FAF6EE
Mobile top bar has centered HoneyGroove wordmark
Mobile top bar has DM badge, notification bell, avatar dropdown on right
Mobile bottom nav is 64px height (h-16) with 5 evenly spaced icons
Mobile bottom nav icons: Home (Hive), Globe (Explore), Search, Library (Collection), ShoppingBag (Honeypot)
Mobile bottom nav active icon color is amber #C8861A (rgb(200, 134, 26))
Mobile bottom nav inactive icon color is muted #8A6B4A at 50% opacity (rgba(138, 107, 74, 0.5))
Mobile-hive click navigates to /hive
Mobile-explore click navigates to /explore
Mobile-collection click navigates to /collection
Mobile-honeypot click navigates to /honeypot
Mobile-search click opens search dialog
Mobile avatar dropdown shows Profile, Settings, Trades, Log out options
Mobile avatar dropdown has Admin Panel for admin users
P0 Fix: login() function returns userData without setting user state when email_verified === false (line 63-66)
P0 Fix: register() function returns userData without setting user state when email_verified === false (line 76-78)
P0 Fix: fetchUser() calls logout() when email_verified === false (line 44-48)
Content padding: HivePage, ExplorePage, CollectionPage have pt-16 md:pt-24 (64px/96px top padding)
Content padding: HivePage, ExplorePage, CollectionPage have pb-24 md:pb-8 (96px/32px bottom padding)
Login flow works for verified user (demo@example.com / password123) on both desktop and mobile
Login rate limiting working (5 per 15 minutes) - returns 429 when exceeded

features_verified.Desktop navigation unchanged: PASSED - top nav visible at 1920px with all elements
features_verified.Mobile desktop nav hidden: PASSED - hidden md:block hides desktop nav on mobile
features_verified.Mobile slim top bar 48px: PASSED - h-12 = 48px, cream bg, wordmark centered, icons on right
features_verified.Mobile search dialog: PASSED - opens GlobalSearch dialog on click
features_verified.Mobile avatar dropdown: PASSED - Profile, Settings, Trades, Log out visible
features_verified.P0 auth fix - unverified users: PASSED - code review confirmed login/register/fetchUser don't set user state
features_verified.Content not hidden behind bars: PASSED - pt-16/pb-24 on mobile provides proper spacing

action_items: Consider adding DialogTitle to search dialog for better accessibility (minor)
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile nav implementation is clean with proper Tailwind responsive classes (md:hidden, hidden md:block)
P0 auth fix properly implemented - unverified users stay on login page with verification banner
Content padding correctly handles both mobile nav bars (48px top + 64px bottom)
Icon colors use inline styles for precise color control (#C8861A and rgba(138, 107, 74, 0.5))
Rate limiting on login (5/15min) is working - tested and confirmed returns 429
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile navigation redesign fully implemented and tested. Desktop nav unchanged at 768px+ breakpoint. Mobile has 48px top bar (cream bg, centered wordmark, DM/bell/avatar on right) and 64px bottom nav (5 icons with amber/muted colors). P0 auth fix verified via code review - unverified users don't get authenticated (user state not set). Login rate limited to 5 attempts per 15 minutes.
